name: Toyo Tire Corporation
summary: Toyo Tire Corporation manufactures and sells tires in Japan and internationally. The company provides tires for passenger vehicles, trucks and buses, construction machinery, and industrial trucks, as well as SUVs, CUVs, and pickup trucks under the Toyo Tires, Nitto, and Silverstone brands. It also offers automotive parts, including engine, motor, member, differential, strut, and exhaust mounts; bushes and couplings; and dynamic dampers; constant verlocity universal joint boots; and air suspensions. The company was formerly known as Toyo Tire & Rubber Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toyo Tire Corporation in January 2019. Toyo Tire Corporation was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Itami City, Japan
